message: Hey , did you catch the latest episode of that show we like?
Hey! Yes, I did. Can you believe that plot twist?
No way! I did not see that coming at all. What do you think will happen next?
I have no idea. This show keeps surprising me every week.
Same here. I can't wait for the next episode.
We should do a watch party sometime!
Definitely. Let's plan for it this weekend.
